name: istra
description: Durable operational project memory for open-ended work in Codex.

interface.longDescription: Resolve the current checkout, maintain requirements, ordered work, blockers, runs and evidence, save authoritative checkpoints, and report perceived Istra faults through the local MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Open the Istra project linked to this checkout and show its current requirements and work queue.
Record this verification run and link its evidence to the relevant acceptance criterion.
Report this perceived Istra MCP, plugin, instruction or workflow fault with concise sanitised evidence.
